name: agentops
description: Import/migrate agent configuration between Codex and Claude Code, plus dreaming: offline refinement of already-recorded memory.

interface.shortDescription: Plan Codex and Claude Code config migrations
interface.longDescription: AgentOps provides a dry-run-first skill for comparing and migrating Codex and Claude Code settings, MCP configuration, skills, prompts, commands, and agent instructions without exposing secrets.
defaultPrompt: Plan a Codex and Claude config import
